scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.dev:local: concurrently -n ollama,server,client -c green,blue,magenta "OLLAMA_ORIGINS=* OLLAMA_NUM_PARALLEL=4 OLLAMA_KEEP_ALIVE=-1 OLLAMA_MAX_LOADED_MODELS=1 ollama serve" "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w shared && npm run typecheck -w client && npm run typecheck -w server
scripts.deploy:hosting: npm run build -w client && firebase deploy --only hosting
scripts.deploy:functions: npm run build -w server && firebase deploy --only functions
